info.name: SyncSetu Professional CRM API
info.description:
# 🚀 SyncSetu API Documentation

Welcome to the official API documentation for **SyncSetu**, a premium WhatsApp-integrated CRM designed for micro-businesses in India. This API serves as the backbone for contact management, lead tracking, and pipeline automation.

## 🛠️ Authentication & Setup
Currently, the API runs on `localhost:5000`. Ensure your backend server is active before testing.

### Base URL
`{{baseUrl}}` (Defaults to `http://localhost:5000/api`)

---

## 📋 Core Modules

### 1. CRM Contacts
Handles the complete lifecycle of a client relationship. From initial lead capture to closing high-value deals. Supports full CRUD operations.

### 2. Dashboard Leads
Specifically designed for the Dashboard's "Recent Leads" widget and quick-action cards.

### 3. System Utilities
Basic health checks and environment verification.

---

## 🎨 Response Standards

| Attribute | Type | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `success` | Boolean | `true` if the request was processed successfully |
| `count` | Integer | (Optional) Total number of items returned |
| `data` | Object/Array | The actual payload containing resource data |
| `error` | String | Error message detail (only on failures) |

item.name: System
item.description: Essential utility endpoints for monitoring server status.

request.description: Verifies that the Express server is up and responding. Use this as a first step if the API seems unreachable.

item.name: CRM Contacts
item.description: Manage the main contact database. This module supports filtering, sorting, and full data manipulation.

request.description:
Fetches the entire list of contacts stored in the MongoDB database.

### Output
- Returns contacts sorted by `createdAt` in descending order.
- Includes `count` of total results.

Creates a new contact record. 

**Note:** This request includes a Post-response script that automatically sets the `{{contactId}}` variable for subsequent Get/Put/Delete requests.
Fetches a specific contact using their unique MongoDB ObjectId.
Used for full updates. All required fields should be present in the body.
Used for partial updates, such as updating just the status or the deal value.
Removes the contact from the system permanently.

item.name: Dashboard Leads
item.description: Endpoints specifically for the fast-paced Dashboard view.

request.description: Retrieves the list of leads shown on the main dashboard cards.
Adds a lead directly from the Dashboard quick-add feature.
